title: Swift Katanas
body:
## Infos
**This is a texturepack where katanas are included.**
- **This texturepack will have bugs but not big ones**
- **this doesnt support sodium**(working on it)

## Dependencies
**If you are a PvP-er ,you _can_ install [PvP essentials](https://modrinth.com/project/Vysdm6cd)** 
- **Use [Variant cits](https://modrinth.com/project/jURjbCaq) to not face any bugs ( it is optional)**

## Join my discord server
- **Why?**: Report bugs or give ideas
- Link: [Click here](https://discord.gg/qVu49UHk7)
